expectations.evidence: Phase 0 explicitly shows 'connect_catalog(hostname="<your-hostname>", catalog_id="<your-catalog-id>")' as the first step, and it appears as entry #1 in the summary table.
Step 1.1 calls 'query_table(table_name="Dataset")' with the note 'If a complete chest X-ray dataset already exists, reuse it and skip to Phase 3 (Split).' It is entry #2 in the summary table.
Step 3.2 calls 'add_dataset_element_type(table_name="Image")' and it appears as entry #9 in the summary table.
Step 3.1 calls create_execution(...) followed immediately by start_execution(), before any dataset creation or split operations. These are entries #7 and #8 in the summary table.
Step 3.3 calls 'create_dataset(..., dataset_types=["Complete", "Labeled"])' — both types are included. Also reflected in entry #10 of the summary table.
Step 4.1 calls split_dataset with 'dry_run=true' before the real split in Step 4.2, and entry #12 in the summary table is explicitly labeled '**dry_run=true**'.
Both the dry-run call (Step 4.1) and the real call (Step 4.2) specify 'test_size=0.15, val_size=0.15', producing the 70/15/15 split.
The stratify_by_column is set to 'Image_Diagnosis_Diagnosis_Image' in both split_dataset calls and is explained in the Assumptions and Key Decisions sections.
Step 4.2 includes 'training_types=["Labeled"], testing_types=["Labeled"], validation_types=["Labeled"]' — all three partition type lists include 'Labeled'.
